message:
feat(jax): add Switch primitive with VJP support and fori_loop evaluator

Add multi-branch conditional (Switch) primitive across the JAX pipeline:

- fj-core: Add Switch variant to Primitive enum with "switch" display name
- fj-ad: Implement Switch VJP — gradient flows through selected branch only,
  zero gradient for all non-selected branches and the index input
- fj-lax: Add eval_switch() that selects branch output by integer index,
  with bounds checking and num_branches parameter support. Also add
  eval_fori_loop() helper that desugars to a simple counted loop
  (lower..upper) calling body_fn(counter, carry) each iteration

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -147,6 +147,7 @@ pub enum Primitive {
     Cond,
     Scan,
     While,
+    Switch,
     // Bitwise
     BitwiseAnd,
     BitwiseOr,
@@ -233,6 +234,7 @@ impl Primitive {
             Self::Cond => "cond",
             Self::Scan => "scan",
             Self::While => "while_loop",
+            Self::Switch => "switch",
             Self::BitwiseAnd => "bitwise_and",
             Self::BitwiseOr => "bitwise_or",
             Self::BitwiseXor => "bitwise_xor",
